key.name: bus-name
key.description: Well-known name of the DBus service to watch on the session bus.

key.name: object-path
key.description: Object path exported by the DBus service.

key.name: interface-name
key.description: Interface on which the watched property is exposed.

key.name: property-name
key.description: Name of the property whose transitions drive the pulse.

key.name: trigger-value
key.description: Unsigned integer value of the property that starts the pulse. Any other value stops it.

key.name: border-color
key.description: CSS color used for the pulsing border (any valid CSS color string, e.g. #ff0000 or rgba(...)).

key.name: border-thickness
key.description: Thickness of the pulsing border in pixels.

key.name: pulse-duration
key.description: Duration of one fade half-cycle (high-to-low or low-to-high) in milliseconds.
